category: Using The Vendor Neutral Contingency And Ras Auxiliary File
description: Add SubConditionElement to RAS memory model This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = addsubconditionelement(subid, condname, condnum, objfield, comparelogic, value, othervalue, absolute, objectfieldevalref)
python_syntax: ierr = addsubconditionelement(subid, condname, condnum, objfield, comparelogic, value, othervalue, absolute, objectfieldevalref)

parameters.name: subid
parameters.description: A string describing the network element substation id. (key). (input).

parameters.name: condnum
parameters.description: Number specifying the number of the condition. omitting this value, or specifying a value of zero will cause this to automatically add the condition to the existing modelcondition. otherwise by specifying a number you can edit existing conditions. (input).

parameters.name: objfield
parameters.description: A field associated with the object to which this model condition applies. a list of fields is shown in section 2.4. in addition to these fields, you may also specify the string _useanotherfilter to signify that this condition refers to another filter. this will be important for the creation of more complex nested filter definitions as described in section 3.2. (input).

parameters.name: comparelogic
parameters.description: Logic to apply to the list of comparisons (and, or, nand, nor,xor,onetrue). (input).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value or field or expression. the entry specifies the value to which the field is compared. this may be done in three ways value : 1.459 or a string field : start with the tag field and then follow with a string using the format as the objectfield string model expression : start with the tag expression and then follow the name of the model expression. (input).

parameters.name: absolute
parameters.description: Set to yes to take the absolute value of the objectfield begin compared. (input; NO by default).

parameters.name: objectfieldevalref
parameters.description: Set to yes to specify that the objectfield should be evaluated in the reference state of the contingency analysis tool. added in simulator version 19, december 18, 2015 patch. (input; NO by default).
